original_query: SELECT "ENAME", "SAL", "DEPTNO" FROM (SELECT "ENAME", "SAL", "DEPTNO" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "ENAME", "SAL", "DEPTNO" HAVING "SAL" > 5000) AS "t4" GROUP BY ROLLUP("ENAME", "SAL", "DEPTNO")
rewritten_query:
SELECT "ENAME", "SAL", "DEPTNO" 
FROM "EMP" 
WHERE "SAL" > 5000 
GROUP BY ROLLUP("ENAME", "SAL", "DEPTNO")

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Removed unnecessary subquery that was grouping by the same columns as the outer query
Replaced HAVING clause in subquery with WHERE clause in main query for better performance
Simplified query structure by eliminating redundant grouping operation
